interpretation: Narrow indirect CEI transform moves a one-time boolean claim before a payout helper call. On the current toolchain, the prior patched shape and the new patched shape both compile and both leave only arbitrary-send-eth as HIGH under Slither; this is semantic hardening and ordering hygiene, not an aggregate external-HIGH uplift claim.
promotion_note: Do not use this single-contract probe as Paper 2 metric uplift evidence. It documents a conservative CEI ordering improvement while preserving visible payout residuals.
